name: Evolution Mining Limited
description: Evolution Mining Limited is a leading mid-tier gold producer with a portfolio of high-quality assets located in Australia and Canada. Established in 2011, the company operates several wholly-owned mines, including Cowal in New South Wales, Mungari in Western Australia, Mt Rawdon and Ernest Henry in Queensland, and Red Lake in Ontario. Evolution focuses on delivering sustainable value through efficient operations, strategic acquisitions, and exploration. The company is committed to safety, environmental stewardship, and community engagement while maintaining a strong financial position and providing consistent returns to its shareholders.
